# znnd

```go
import "github.com/zenon-network/go-zenon/cmd/znnd"
```

Command znnd is the standalone Zenon Network of Momentum node binary.

### Overview

znnd parses command\-line flags and an optional \`config.json\`, opens or initializes the data directory, and starts the [github.com/zenon\\\-network/go\\\-zenon/zenon](<https://pkg.go.dev/github.com/zenon-network/go-zenon/zenon/>) core via [github.com/zenon\\\-network/go\\\-zenon/app](<https://pkg.go.dev/github.com/zenon-network/go-zenon/app/>) and [github.com/zenon\\\-network/go\\\-zenon/node](<https://pkg.go.dev/github.com/zenon-network/go-zenon/node/>).

Per\-command documentation is being filled in incrementally. See docs/STYLE.md for the full template applied in subsequent PRs.
